resources.string: UPI Offline Assistant is an open-source Android application that allows users to scan UPI QR codes offline and initiate telecom-based USSD (*99#) payments without internet.

• Offline QR scanning
• Extract UPI ID and amount
• Automatic clipboard copy
• Launch *99# dialer
• Step-by-step payment guidance
• No internet permission
• No tracking
• No data storage
This project is open source and licensed under the Apache License 2.0.
This application does NOT process payments. It does NOT store UPI PIN or transaction data. USSD service availability depends on telecom operator and bank support.
Pay via USSD (*99#) without internet.\nScan any UPI QR code to get started.
Point camera at a UPI QR code
Camera access is required to scan QR codes
🔒 Your UPI PIN is never captured or stored by this app.
Call permission denied — please dial *99# manually.
*99# has been dialed. Follow these steps in the USSD menu:
*99# has been dialed. USSD prompts are being auto-filled.
Enter UPI ID: %1$s\n(Long press and paste from clipboard)
Enter your UPI PIN to confirm
Payment was not successful. Please try again.
📱 Transaction confirmation will be received via SMS from your bank. This app does not verify or track transactions.
This app does not replace official UPI apps. No payment data is stored.
Auto-fills USSD (*99#) payment prompts with UPI ID and amount from scanned QR codes. UPI PIN is never auto-filled.
Enable the UPI Offline Assistant accessibility service to automatically fill USSD payment prompts (Send Money, UPI ID, amount). Your UPI PIN is never auto-filled.
Camera permission denied. Cannot scan QR codes.
Camera is unavailable on this device.
Invalid QR: Not a UPI payment code.
